steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The parenthetical “(discontinued in 2021)” reveals that the required software no longer exists—the reason the artworks are inaccessible.

steps.title: Match the correct word
steps.content: ”Defunct” directly names software no longer in operation—precisely fitting Flash's discontinued status. The other three either contradict the situation (ubiquitous suggests widespread availability; extraneous suggests unnecessary software when the artworks require it) or miss the actual issue (arcane means obscure, not unavailable). That matches choice A — A is correct.
